parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: While on, the will respond to the OP that is referenced.

parameters.name: executeloc
parameters.label: Execute from
parameters.description: ( only) Determines the location the script is run from.

parameters.name: fromop
parameters.label: From Operator
parameters.description: The path that the script will be executed from if the parameter is set to

parameters.name: op
parameters.label: Monitor OPs
parameters.description: Specify which operators to monitor to trigger the scripts.

parameters.name: precook
parameters.label: Pre Cook
parameters.description: The method is triggered before the operator is cooked.

parameters.name: postcook
parameters.label: Post Cook
parameters.description: The method is triggered after the operator is cooked.

parameters.name: flagchange
parameters.label: Flag Change
parameters.description: The method is triggered when one of the operator's changes state. This includes all the flags in the Common Flags list of an , plus all the python accessible flags listed in , , .

parameters.name: wirechange
parameters.label: Wire Change
parameters.description: The method is triggered when the operator's inputs are rewired (connected, disconnected, swapped).

parameters.name: namechange
parameters.label: Name Change
parameters.description: The method is triggered when the name of the operator is changed.

parameters.name: pathchange
parameters.label: Path Change
parameters.description: The method is triggered when the path of the operator is changed.

parameters.name: uichange
parameters.label: UI Change
parameters.description: The method is triggered when operator is resized or moved in the network editor.

parameters.name: numchildrenchange
parameters.label: Number Children Change
parameters.description: The onNumChildrenChange() method is triggered if the number of children an operator has changes. Only works with type operators.

parameters.name: childrename
parameters.label: Child Rename
parameters.description: The method is triggered if a child of the operator is renamed.

parameters.name: currentchildchange
parameters.label: Current Child Change
parameters.description: The method is triggered if a child of the operator is made current in a network. Only works with type operators.

parameters.name: extensionchange
parameters.label: Extension Change
parameters.description: The method is triggered when an extension of the operator is changed.

parameters.name: edit
parameters.label: Edit..
parameters.description: Clicking this opens a text editor to edit text in the .

parameters.name: file
parameters.label: File
parameters.description: The filesystem path and name of the file to load. Accepts and files.

parameters.name: syncfile
parameters.label: Sync to File
parameters.description: When On, loads the file from disk into the when the projects starts.  A filename must be specified.  Turning on the option will load the file from disk immediately.  If the file does not exist, it wil

parameters.name: loadonstart
parameters.label: Load on Start
parameters.description: When On, reloads the file from disk into the when the projects starts.

parameters.name: loadonstartpulse
parameters.label: Load File
parameters.description: Instantly reloads the file.

parameters.name: write
parameters.label: Write on Toe Save
parameters.description: When On, writes the contents of the out to the file on disk when the project is saved.

parameters.name: writepulse
parameters.label: Write File
parameters.description: Instantly write the file to disk.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: customext
parameters.label: Custom Extension
parameters.description: Specifiy the custom extension.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.

parameters.name: defaultreadencoding
parameters.label: Defaultreadencoding
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: destroy
parameters.label: Destroy
parameters.description: Help Not Available.
